Figure 4: The statistics of emotion extraction of Moltbook agent. From left, we present the emotion of Agent bio, posts and comments with text by roberta model.

Table 3: Agents Behavioral Typology in PSR space based on 𝑑𝑝𝑟 , 𝑑𝑝𝑠 , and 𝑑𝑟𝑠 . For instance, 𝑑𝑝𝑟 , 𝑑𝑝𝑠 , and 𝑑𝑟𝑠 is the distance between centroid of agent bio and agent post, post and comment and bio and comment respectively.

Figure 5: The total classification of agents’ emotion patterns is based on the PSR domain, where the agent has a biography and interacts with other agents in the notebook thought either post or comment or both.
Figure 2: Emotion mapping in Valence-Arousal-Dominance (VAD) Framework followed by NRC VAD Lexicon [7]. Table 1 shows the details of the emotion along with the short code of the emotion
